result.markdown: --- title: "020: Pace" date: "2023-03-07" categories: - geom-density format: html: code-fold: true code-summary: "Code" editor: visual --- ### Load data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # load december gp <- read_csv("03_to_23.csv") # find mean pace gp %>% group_by(coach) %>% summarise(mean = mean(pace)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` # A tibble: 2 × 2 coach mean 1 Hubert Davis 70.1 2 Roy Williams 72.7 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # 70.1 davis # 72.7 williams # find record over last 70 gp %>% slice(579:648) %>% group_by(wl) %>% count() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` # A tibble: 2 × 2 # Groups: wl [2] wl n 1 L 32 2 W 38 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # 1 L 32 # 2 W 38 # find same time frame gp %>% filter(pace < 70 & season > 2017) %>% group_by(coach) %>% count() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` # A tibble: 2 × 2 # Groups: coach [2] coach n 1 Hubert Davis 33 2 Roy Williams 33 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # 1 Hubert Davis 33 # 2 Roy Williams 33 ann_dat_text<-data.frame( coach=c("Hubert Davis","Roy Williams"), pace=c(0.040,70), label=c("~53% of games \nover 70 possessions","~70% of games \nover 70 possessions") ) ``` ::: ### Set the theme for the plot ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # theme theme_me <- function () { theme_minimal(base_size = 10, base_family = "RobotoCondensed-Regular") %+replace% theme ( plot.title = element_text( hjust = 0.5, size = 24, face = "bold" ), plot.subtitle = element_text( hjust = 0.5, size = 10, lineheight = 0.25, vjust = -0.5 ), plot.caption = element_text( hjust = 1, size = 6, lineheight = 0.35, margin = margin(t = 20) ), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), plot.background = element_rect(fill = "floral white", color = "floral white") ) } ``` ::: ### Create density plot ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} dense <- gp %>% ggplot() + aes(x = pace) + geom_density() + geom_density(fill="#56a0d3", size = 2, position="identity", alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed")+ coord_flip() + facet_grid(. ~ coach) + theme_me() + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_markdown(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), strip.text.x = element_markdown(size = 12, face = "bold") ) + labs( x = "", y = "", title = "North Carolina \npace of play \nunder", caption = "dadgumboxscores | March 7, 2023 | data via kenpom" ) + geom_text( data = ann_dat_text, y = 0.027, x = 73, label=ann_dat_text$label, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold" ) # save it ggsave( "dense.png", dense, w = 6, h = 8, dpi = 600, type = 'cairo' ) dense ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](byc_020_pace_files/figure-html/density-plot-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ###
